ddl.value: priority IS NULL OR priority IN ('low', 'normal', 'high', 'urgent')
ddl.name: conversations_priority_check

ddl.value: outcome IS NULL OR outcome IN ('resolved', 'escalated', 'abandoned', 'topic_change')
ddl.name: conversations_outcome_check

ddl.value: autonomy_level IS NULL OR autonomy_level IN ('full_ai', 'ai_with_escalation', 'human_assisted', 'human_only')
ddl.name: conversations_autonomy_level_check

ddl.value: user_id IS NOT NULL OR contact_id IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: message_feedback_actor_check

ddl.value: status IS NULL OR status IN ('queued', 'sent', 'delivered', 'read', 'failed')
ddl.name: messages_status_check

ddl.value: resolution_status IS NULL OR resolution_status IN ('pending', 'reviewed', 'dismissed')
ddl.name: messages_resolution_status_check

ddl.value: user_id IS NOT NULL OR contact_id IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: reactions_actor_check
